_note: Edit this file to update the whole site. 'projects' = real client work (shown with process details). 'samples' = spec pieces you recorded to show range. See README.md. View via a server / GitHub Pages, not by double-clicking the file.

site.name: Nabilla Zahrina
site.seoDescription: Bilingual Indonesian and English voice over with a warm, conversational tone — natural, genuine, and easy to listen to, for commercials, narration, e-learning and more. Fresh talent, fast and flexible.

hero.eyebrow: Voice Over Artist · Available for hire
hero.lede: Hi, I'm Nabilla — a voice-over artist with a warm, conversational style that feels natural, genuine, and easy to listen to. I work across commercials, narration, e-learning and beyond, in both Indonesian and English — and I'm open to all kinds of projects.

about.heading: Nice to meet you.
paragraphs: My voice is naturally warm and conversational — genuine, easy to listen to, and the kind that helps a brand feel approachable rather than scripted. I'm comfortable across commercials, narration, e-learning and more, and I happily take on new styles and briefs of all kinds.

I work comfortably in both Indonesian and English (and yes, my English is solid), so I can voice for local and international-facing projects alike. I'm early in my voice-over journey, which means every project gets my full focus, fresh energy, and real care — have a listen to the samples below and hear for yourself.

details.title: Languages
details.text: Indonesian (native) and English (fluent) — happy to voice in either.

details.title: Recording setup
details.text: Home recording, edited in CapCut Pro — clean, ready-to-use files. Upgrading the kit as projects grow.

details.title: Delivery
details.text: Edited MP3 / WAV, ready to drop in. Quick, flexible turnaround.

cards.title: Fresh & all-in

contact.heading: Tell me about your project.
contact.lede: Scripts, timelines, or that half-formed idea you can't stop thinking about — I'd love to hear it. Reach out whichever way is easiest for you, and I'll reply personally.
